title: athanasia oocephala
intro: Athanasia oocephala, also known as Cape marigold, is a flowering plant native to the Cape Province in South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Athanasia oocephala include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and act as an antiseptic, making it useful for treating skin conditions and infections. Herbal preparations of Athanasia oocephala are often made by infusing the flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant in ointments and creams to treat skin conditions.
